apps.name: Calendar
apps.description: Integrated calendar with Google Calendar connection
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
Your schedule, beautifully simple. Calendar connects to your Google Calendar and gives you a clean month view with a daily agenda alongside it — so you always know what's next.

**Highlights**

- Connects securely to Google Calendar via OAuth
- Month grid with events on every day, plus a focused daily agenda
- See times, locations, attendees, and meeting links at a glance
- Jump between months effortlessly

> Sign in with Google the first time you open it. Your tokens are stored locally and never leave your machine.

apps.name: Code
apps.description: A lightweight, VS Code-like IDE for exploring and editing local codebases with integrated AI context and browser preview.
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
A real IDE, right inside Moldable. Code is a lightweight, VS Code–like editor for exploring and editing local codebases — with a file tree, multi-tab editing, an integrated terminal, and a live browser preview.

**Highlights**

- File tree navigation with create, rename, and delete
- Multi-tab editor with Monaco syntax highlighting
- Integrated terminal and live browser preview for web projects
- Command palette for quick actions; remembers your open tabs
- Gives the Moldable agent rich context about your project

apps.name: Daily Affirmations
apps.description: A soothing, daily affirmation app to improve mental health and positivity.
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
Start your day with a moment of calm. Daily Affirmations serves up soothing, positive statements across categories like Inner Peace, Self Love, Gratitude, and Courage — with gentle animations that make each one land.

**Highlights**

- Browse affirmations by mood and category
- Smooth, calming animations and a quiet, focused design
- Save the ones that resonate to your favorites
- Fully local — your reflections stay on your machine

apps.name: DB Browser
apps.description: Connect to PostgreSQL databases and browse schemas, tables, and read-only query results
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
Explore your database without leaving Moldable. DB Browser connects to PostgreSQL and lets you inspect schemas, tables, and views — and run bounded, read-only queries safely.

**Highlights**

- Connect to PostgreSQL with saved connections
- Object browser for schemas, tables, views, and column details
- Saved SQL editor tabs with formatting and query history
- Read-only, bounded query results in a clean table
- Exposes safe APIs so Moldable can help you read schema and edit SQL

apps.name: Git
apps.description: Simple Git client for branch management, staging, and diffing
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
Git, made visual. Stage, diff, commit, and push without memorizing commands. Git shows you exactly what changed and lets you ship it with confidence.

**Highlights**

- See changed files in your working directory
- Stage and unstage with checkboxes; review syntax-highlighted diffs
- Write commit messages and commit only what you select
- Browse commit history, undo the last commit, and push to remote
- Switch between repositories in a click

apps.name: Hello Moldables
apps.description: Welcome to Moldable! Learn how to build and modify apps with AI.
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
New to Moldable? Start here. Hello Moldables is a friendly, hands-on tour that shows you how to install apps, use them, and shape them — or build entirely new ones — just by asking.

**Highlights**

- A guided welcome to how Moldable works
- Learn to install and customize apps in minutes
- See how to describe a change and watch Moldable make it
- The fastest way to go from curious to capable

apps.name: Images
apps.description: Generate and iterate images with GPT Image 2
apps.author: Moldable
apps.about:
Imagine it, then make it. Images generates and iterates on pictures with GPT Image 2 — describe what you want, refine it, and even knock out the background.

**Highlights**

- Generate images from a text prompt with GPT Image 2
- Iterate on a result until it's right
- Optional background removal
- Keep a local gallery of everything you make

credentials.name: OpenAI API Key
credentials.description: Fallback for GPT Image 2 generation and image edits when Codex CLI auth is unavailable.

apps.name: Mail
apps.description: Fast Gmail client for triage, search, reading, and sending email
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
A fast inbox built for triage. Mail is a snappy Gmail client for reading, searching, and sending — with an AI briefing that surfaces what actually needs your attention.

**Highlights**

- Connects to Gmail via OAuth
- Built for speed: triage, search, archive, snooze, and label
- Read messages with attachments and one-click unsubscribe
- Compose and reply inline
- AI briefing summarizes your important unread mail

> Sign in with Google the first time you open it. Credentials are stored locally and never exposed to generated code.

apps.name: Meetings
apps.description: Record, transcribe, and summarize meetings with real-time transcription
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
Never take meeting notes alone again. Meetings records your audio, transcribes it in real time, detects who's speaking, and gives you a rich notes pane to write alongside the transcript.

**Highlights**

- Real-time transcription powered by Deepgram
- Automatic speaker detection
- A rich-text notes editor that lives next to the transcript
- Export everything to Markdown when you're done

apps.name: Microscope
apps.description: Explore the natural world through generated images, transparent 2D relief layers, procedural 3D models, and optional fal Hunyuan3D or Tripo renders.
apps.author: Moldable
apps.about:
Zoom in on the natural world. Microscope turns a curiosity into a vivid, layered exploration — generated imagery, transparent 2D relief layers, and procedural 3D models you can turn around.

**Highlights**

- Generate detailed nature imagery with GPT Image 2
- Peel through transparent 2D relief layers
- Build procedural 3D models, with optional fal Hunyuan3D or Tripo renders
- A playful, hands-on way to learn

apps.name: Notes
apps.description: A Google Keep-style note taking app with pinning and markdown support
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
Capture every thought. Notes is a Google Keep–style space for quick ideas and longer writing alike — pin what matters, label to organize, and search it all instantly.

**Highlights**

- Rich-text notes with markdown support
- Pin important notes to the top
- Labels, archive, and full-text search
- Masonry grid layout that's easy to scan

apps.name: Piano
apps.description: A local-first piano song library with 88-key playback and falling-note practice visualization.
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
Play, practice, and keep your songs. Piano is a local-first library with full 88-key playback and a falling-note visualization that makes practicing feel like a game.

**Highlights**

- 88-key playback right in the app
- Falling-note practice visualization
- Organize your songs into folders
- Local-first — your library is yours

apps.name: Remotion
apps.description: Create programmatic videos with Remotion - manage projects, preview compositions, and render videos
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
Make videos with code. Remotion lets you build programmatic videos with React — manage projects, preview compositions live, and render the final cut to MP4.

**Highlights**

- Create video projects from React components
- Live preview player to see changes instantly
- Add text overlays, images, and animations on a timeline
- Render to MP4 with Remotion's renderer

apps.name: Scribo Languages
apps.description: Language learning journal with AI-powered translations
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
Keep a journal in a new language. Scribo translates as you write — see real-time DeepL translations, hear them spoken aloud, and build a habit one entry at a time.

**Highlights**

- Write in your native language; see live translations via DeepL
- Multiple language pairs (English → French, Spanish, and more)
- Listen to translations with natural text-to-speech
- A running history of every journal entry

apps.name: Tasks
apps.description: Linear-style local project and task management
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
Plan work like a pro — locally. Tasks brings a Linear-style workflow to your machine: projects, issues, labels, comments, and attachments, all without a subscription or a server.

**Highlights**

- Linear-style projects and task management
- Labels, comments, and attachments
- Fast keyboard-driven workflow
- Entirely local and private

apps.name: Time Tracker
apps.description: Track time for work projects with weekly views and export
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
Know where your time goes. Time Tracker makes logging hours painless — start and stop timers, group by project, and export when it's time to invoice.

**Highlights**

- Start/stop timers for tasks
- Organize entries by color-coded projects
- List and weekly calendar views, with easy week navigation
- Export your entries to CSV

apps.name: Todo
apps.description: Simple task management with quick add and completion tracking
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
The simplest way to get things done. Todo is quick task management done right — add fast, prioritize, filter, and keep moving with full keyboard navigation.

**Highlights**

- Quick add and one-tap completion
- High / medium / low priorities
- Filter by all, active, or completed
- Keyboard navigation throughout; stored locally

apps.name: Wiki
apps.description: Create, edit, and organize a Markdown knowledge base.
apps.author: Moldable Team
apps.about:
Your personal knowledge base. Wiki is a clean, Markdown-first space to write, link, and organize everything you want to remember.

**Highlights**

- Create and edit pages in Markdown
- Organize a growing knowledge base
- Fast to write in, easy to navigate
- Local-first and entirely yours
